name: Generate and email PDF invoices from new Google Sheets orders

parameters.content:
## Generate and email PDF invoices from new Google Sheets orders

### Who's it for

Small businesses and freelancers who track orders in a Google Sheet and still assemble invoices by hand.

### How it works

Every new row in your Orders sheet becomes a styled PDF invoice with line items, tax, and totals. The workflow builds the invoice HTML, validates the row, renders the PDF with the Acrewity community node, emails it to the customer via Gmail, archives a copy in Google Drive, and updates the row to Status = Invoiced so nothing is billed twice.

A row with bad data (broken Items JSON, a missing item name, no email address) never blocks the others — its Status cell receives a plain-English error message so you can fix it right in the sheet.

### Setup steps

1. Install the verified community node `@acrewity/n8n-nodes-acrewity` and add your Acrewity API credential (free key at acrewity.com, 100 free credits/month)
2. Connect Google Sheets, Gmail, and Google Drive credentials
3. Create an Orders sheet. Paste this line into cell A1 — it fills the whole header row:

Order Number	Customer Name	Customer Email	Customer Address	Items	Due Date	Notes	Status

4. Items holds a JSON array, e.g. [{"name":"Widget","quantity":2,"price":9.99}]
5. Pick your spreadsheet in the trigger and both Sheets update nodes, your archive folder in the Drive node, and edit Set Workflow Configuration (company name, logo, tax rate)

### Customization

Adjust the invoice look in Create Invoice HTML (the editable lines are marked CHANGE ME), change the email copy in Send Invoice via Email, or add a Slack notification after the Drive archive step.

## Capture order settings

Starts when a new order row is added in Google Sheets, then applies invoice-wide configuration such as company name, logo URL, tax rate, and currency symbol.

## Build and validate invoice

Creates the invoice HTML from the order data and checks whether the order is valid. Invalid orders are routed downward to update the sheet as failed.

## Generate PDF file

Handles the valid-order path by converting the generated invoice HTML into a PDF and then preparing that PDF as a file attachment for downstream steps.

## Deliver and record invoice

Sends the invoice PDF to the customer, archives a copy in Google Drive, and updates the original Google Sheets order row to mark it as invoiced.

assignments.name: emailSubjectPrefix
assignments.value: Your invoice from Your Company Inc.

parameters.subject: ={{ $('Create Invoice HTML').item.json.emailSubject }}
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('Create Invoice HTML').item.json.customerName }},

Thank you for your order. Your invoice {{ $('Create Invoice HTML').item.json.orderNumber }} is attached as a PDF.

If you have any questions, just reply to this email.

Best regards
